name: searxng
description: SearXNG — self-hosted privacy metasearch (aggregates Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo/Brave/etc. with no upstream API keys). Internal-only: no Traefik route, reached over the overlay at http://searxng:8080 by the n8n search MCP. JSON output, secret_key, and a disabled bot-limiter are seeded into settings.yml by install.sh. No Redis — limiter off for low-volume internal use.
